panels.title: Fresh input (uncached)
panels.description: Fresh input after prompt-cache hits. Every request replays its full context, but cache reads serve most of it.

panels.title: Cache reads (billed at 10%)
panels.description: Previously seen context served from the prompt cache. It still counts as context volume, but API-equivalent pricing is 0.1× fresh input.

panels.title: Output tokens (raw)
panels.description: New model output, shown as raw tokens. API-equivalent output pricing is roughly five times fresh-input pricing, depending on the model.

panels.title: Cost (USD estimate)
panels.description: Reported API-equivalent cost over the selected range. This is the closest available proxy for subscription-window burn; raw token volume overstates it because cache reads are discounted.

options.content: **Every request replays its full context** (conversation, system prompt, and tools). Context volume = fresh input + cache reads + cache creation, so fresh input is naturally small. **Cost is a weighted sum:** input × 1.0, cache creation × 1.25, cache reads × 0.1, and output × about 5. **USD cost is the best proxy for subscription-window burn** because cheap cache reads dominate raw token totals.

panels.title: Cost allocation, by token type (USD)
panels.description: API-equivalent cost allocation in USD for the selected range. Each series uses the same selected-range total as Cost (USD estimate), so the four legend Totals add up to that card within rounding. The total is split by input × 1.0, cache reads × 0.1, cache creation × 1.25, and output × 5.0; per-model price differences stay in the reported USD total.

targets.expr: (sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) / ((sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 0.1 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 1.25 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheCreation",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 5 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="output",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)))

(sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * (0.1 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0))) / ((sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 0.1 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 1.25 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheCreation",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 5 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="output",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)))

(sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * (1.25 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheCreation",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0))) / ((sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 0.1 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 1.25 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheCreation",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 5 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="output",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)))

(sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) * (5 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="output",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0))) / ((sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 0.1 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 1.25 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheCreation",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + 5 * (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="output",project_id=~"$project"}[$__range])) or vector(0)))

panels.title: Tokens over time, by model
panels.description: Full input context volume by resolved gateway model. Adding per-type vectors would drop models missing a type (Codex has no cache measurements), so this tracks context_tokens, present on every record.

panels.title: Usage by project
panels.description: Exact Prometheus token and cost totals by project over the selected range. The table totals match the headline stats.

panels.title: Models in use
panels.description: Full input context volume (fresh input + cache) by resolved gateway model over the selected range. Output tokens excluded.

panels.title: Token volume by backend
panels.description: Full input context volume by resolved backend from gateway records: anthropic (Claude subscription) vs codex (ChatGPT subscription). Output tokens excluded.

panels.title: Tool activity by name
panels.description: Estimated result tokens by tool. A tool result re-enters the LLM as input on later requests, usually at cache-read rates after its first inclusion, so large results tax every turn until compaction. Call count stays visible for frequency.

panels.title: Tool activity error rate
panels.description: Share of completed tool activity carrying an error status. This is frequency, not token cost.

panels.title: Tool activity duration p95
panels.description: Observed hook duration when the hook payload supplies it. Missing durations stay unavailable.

panels.title: Active vs idle time
panels.description: Claude Code active-time telemetry, grouped by the provider activity type.

panels.title: MCP activity by server / tool
panels.description: MCP server rollup for estimated tool-result tokens and calls. Tool results re-enter the LLM as input on later requests. The adjacent definition table shows the per-request input cost of each server’s tool definitions; per-tool detail is directly beneath.

panels.title: MCP definition footprint by server
panels.description: Estimated input tokens spent per request on each MCP server’s tool definitions. Server names come from normalized gateway.mcp.footprint records, so new servers appear automatically.

panels.title: MCP tool detail by server / tool
panels.description: Per-tool detail for the MCP server rollup above. Totals sum estimated result tokens and calls across all listed tools.

targets.expr: sum by (workbench_attribute_mcp_server, workbench_attribute_tool_name) (sum_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "hook.post_tool_use" | workbench_attribute_is_mcp = "true" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | unwrap workbench_measurement_tool_result_tokens_estimate_value [$__range]))

panels.title: MCP connection activity
panels.description: Connection events by server and status. Claude Code only emits these when a connection event includes both labels, so an empty state is normal when none are reported.

panels.title: Gateway usage by session and role
panels.description: Exact provider input context and request count by session, agent role, and resolved model. Project names come from session-start events; Session is the short UUID fallback when a session has no labeled start event in the selected range.

targets.expr: sum by (workbench_session_id, session_label, workbench_attribute_agent_role, workbench_attribute_model) (sum_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "gateway.token.usage" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_session_id != "" | label_format session_label="{{ .workbench_session_id | trunc 8 }}" | unwrap workbench_measurement_context_tokens_value [$__range]))

sum by (workbench_session_id, session_label, workbench_attribute_agent_role, workbench_attribute_model) (count_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "gateway.token.usage" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_session_id != "" | label_format session_label="{{ .workbench_session_id | trunc 8 }}" [$__range]))

max by (workbench_session_id, workbench_attribute_project_name) (count_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "hook.session_start" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_session_id != "" | workbench_attribute_project_name != "" [$__range]))

panels.title: Orchestrator vs executor usage
panels.description: Full input context grouped from exact gateway agent headers. A missing agent ID is the orchestrator.

panels.title: Subagent lifecycle activity
panels.description: Starts and stops by agent type. Sidequest dispatch IDs are shortened in the legend. Counts lifecycle activity, not tokens.

targets.expr: sum by (agent_type) (count_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |~ "hook.subagent_(start|stop)" | workbench_attribute_agent_type != "" | label_format agent_type="{{ regexReplaceAll \"^sidequest-sq-([0-9]+)-.*\" .workbench_attribute_agent_type \"ticket $1\" }}" [$__auto]))

panels.title: Context-window growth
panels.description: Exact full input context by session. Session IDs are shortened to eight characters; drops can indicate compaction. Output has no source attribution.

targets.expr: max by (session_label) (max_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "gateway.token.usage" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_session_id != "" | label_format session_label="{{ .workbench_session_id | trunc 8 }}" | unwrap workbench_measurement_context_tokens_value [$__auto]))

panels.title: Input composition over time
panels.description: Estimated token split normalized to exact provider input. Tool-result tokens are nested in messages and are not stacked again.

panels.title: Prompt-cache economics
panels.description: Exact aggregate cache buckets. Reads cost 0.1x base input, 5-minute writes 1.25x, and 1-hour writes 2x. Per-section cache attribution remains estimated.

panels.title: Hook execution activity / failures
panels.description: Own-hook completion frequency by hook name and provider status. Hook duration stays unavailable when Claude Code omits it from this event.

panels.title: Ticket dispatch usage and route drift
panels.description: Selected-range gateway usage joined to Sidequest ticket snapshots by dispatch agent ID. Each row is one unique dispatch attempt: repeated ticket rows are rework, and configured vs resolved model shows route drift. Batched agents mapped to multiple tickets are excluded rather than double-counted; the SQLite report retains their ambiguity and the structured bounce history. Dollar cost appears only when a cost_usd estimate is present.

targets.expr: sum by (workbench_agent_id, workbench_attribute_model) (sum_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "gateway.token.usage" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_agent_id != "" | unwrap workbench_measurement_context_tokens_value [$__range]))

sum by (workbench_agent_id, workbench_attribute_model) (sum_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "gateway.token.usage" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" | workbench_agent_id != "" | unwrap workbench_measurement_cost_usd_value [$__range]))

((sum by (workbench_agent_id, workbench_ticket_ref, workbench_attribute_category, workbench_attribute_configured_model) (count_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "sidequest.ticket" | workbench_agent_id != "" | workbench_ticket_ref != "" | workbench_attribute_category != "" | workbench_attribute_configured_model != "" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" [$__range])) > bool 0) and on (workbench_agent_id) (count by (workbench_agent_id) (sum by (workbench_agent_id, workbench_ticket_ref, workbench_attribute_category, workbench_attribute_configured_model) (count_over_time({service_name="workbench-observer"} |= "sidequest.ticket" | workbench_agent_id != "" | workbench_ticket_ref != "" | workbench_attribute_category != "" | workbench_attribute_configured_model != "" | workbench_session_id !~ "(probe|session-gateway).*" [$__range])) > bool 0) == 1))

options.content: **Wakeup joins (SQ-755).** `hook.post_tool_use` records for `SendMessage` retain `workbench_attribute_recipient` and `workbench_tool_use_id`, so pre/post/tool-result records join on the exact tool-use ID without logging message text. The first later orchestrator `gateway.token.usage` record gets `workbench_attribute_wake_reason` as `subagent_stop` or `teammate_message` when the local observer already has the causal hook. Group wake reasons by `workbench_session_id`; an empty reason means no causal hook was available, not zero wakeups.
